chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 106 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.05.2022 For orders on office objection For hearing of main case Mr. Rao Faisal Ali, Advocate for Petitioners Mr. Rafiq Ahmed Dahri, Asstt: A.G. In relation to a dispute of inherited property originally a suit was filed being Suit No. 39 of 2021 which was disposed off on account of a statement of withdrawal; it pertains to an issue of foti khata badal. Be that as it may, on the strength of such order proceedings claimed to have been initiated but soon thereafter the revenue entry was challenged by the brother of the petitioners before Additional Deputy Commissioner-I, which then passed an order perhaps without hearing the petitioners though they have been arrayed as respondents. This order was passed on 21.12.2021. Without commenting as to whether these petitioners who were respondents in the Revenue Appeal No. 10 of 2021 were served or otherwise, this petition is not the remedy to assail the order of Additional Deputy Commissioner-I dated 21.12.2021. They have the remedies available to them under the law under the revenue hierarchy as well as under the plenary jurisdiction of civil court. This being a situation and as conceded by the counsel we do not find ourselves inclined to interfere in these proceedings. The petitioners are left at liberty to exhaust their remedy as they deem fit and proper under the circumstances of the case. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
